stemHtml: Which of these statements about rudder pedal nose wheel steering of a jet transport aeroplane is correct?

options.a: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering functions on the ground as well as in the air.
options.b: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering only functions during take-off roll.
options.c: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering offers a smaller maximum deflection of the nose wheel as tiller nose wheel steering.
options.d: When performing a rudder check during taxiing there is no need for additional pilot action to avoid deflection of the nose wheel.
